name: Roast Garlic Broad Brean & Saffron Soup
recipeInstructions: Preparation: Shell the broad beans. Put the rice in a saucepan with the water, salt and saffron. Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes or until all the water has been absorbed and the rice is tender. Meanwhile, preheat oven to Gas Mark 5/190C/375F. Put the garlic cloves in a small roasting tin with the oil and roast in the oven for 10-15 minutes or until they are soft and golden but not brown. Turn them once to make sure they do not brown underneath. Add the beans to the rice, pour on the stock and bring to boil. Add the garlic cloves and their oil, reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes. Remove from heat, cool a little then puree in a food processor or blender. Taste and season to taste, then serve immediately.
